name: Worker Card
description: Equal-sized draggable card used in the kanban grid view. A dense information block representing one Worker process: agent type, current status, uptime, worktree path, project ownership, and hierarchy role (main/sub/peer). Selected card shows accent border + glow. Drag handle indicated by a subtle grip texture on the left edge.

anatomy.description: 1px solid var(--color-border) rectangle, no border-radius. Background var(--color-bg-secondary) default; var(--color-bg-elevated) on hover
Agent type label (var(--text-md), weight 700, color var(--color-accent) for main / var(--color-text-primary) for others) + Status Badge on the right
Dense rows: uptime · worktree path · project · hierarchy tag. var(--text-xs), color var(--color-text-secondary). Keys in var(--color-text-muted)
When selected: border 1px var(--color-border-accent) + box-shadow var(--shadow-glow). Cursor becomes grabbing during drag
Left 2px wide strip, background var(--color-divider); on hover shows a ⋮⋮ grip pattern in var(--color-text-muted)

structurePatterns: display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: var(--space-1)
CSS Grid in kanban: grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: var(--space-2)
Meta rows: display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr; gap: var(--space-2)
usageHints: Cards in the same column MUST be equal-sized (grid enforces this)
Hierarchy tag color-codes: main=accent, sub=text-secondary, peer=text-muted
doNotInvent: Never round corners — sharp 0px radius is mandatory
Never add card lift shadow on hover — only border color + bg elevation change
Do not show avatars or images; TUI cards are text-only
